privileged_info_summary: The power_dependency_mapping@1 task is a synthetic scenario involving six electrical Configuration Items (CIs) representing a realistic commercial building power distribution topology. All six CIs are created during task setup: ELEC-XFMR-001 (480V/208V step-down transformer), ELEC-SWGR-001 (main switchgear), ELEC-DP-001 and ELEC-DP-002 (distribution panels for floors 1 and 2), ELEC-ATS-001 (automatic transfer switch), and ELEC-UPS-001 (UPS for server room). Five directed power feed relationships must be created: transformer feeds switchgear, switchgear feeds both distribution panels and ATS, and ATS feeds UPS. The occupation is Maintenance and Repair Workers, General (SOC 49-9071.00) in the Commercial Property Management industry. All equipment types, voltage specifications (480V to 208V), and power topology are technically accurate per industry standards.
